## FakeDeadLetterPublisher Class

Fake implementation of [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.IDeadLetterPublisher](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.server.events.ideadletterpublisher 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.IDeadLetterPublisher') for unit testing\.
Thread\-safe for concurrent test scenarios\. Captures all published dead\-letter messages
and supports configurable failure mode\.

```csharp
public sealed class FakeDeadLetterPublisher : Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.IDeadLetterPublisher
```
